items.name: v4.3.2 (dev)
items.body: Adjusted lookout vision range, added the Watchtower modifier, improved zlyBot v2 and gcBot, added map creator hotkeys and in-game speed controls, and smoothed replay handling.
items.summary: Adjusted lookout vision range, added the Watchtower modifier, improved zlyBot v2 and gcBot, added map creator hotkeys and in-game speed controls, and smoothed replay handling.

items.name: v4.3.1 (dev)
items.body: Corrected the Lookout vision range and rolled the headline v4.3.0 improvements into a more stable developer release.
items.summary: Corrected the Lookout vision range and rolled the headline v4.3.0 improvements into a more stable developer release.

items.name: v4.3.0 (dev)
items.body: Introduced gap-based layout polish, up to 16 players, million-turn replay support, new bots including szlyBot and gcBot, and new terrain types such as Desert, Lookout, and Observatory.
items.summary: Introduced gap-based layout polish, up to 16 players, million-turn replay support, new bots including szlyBot and gcBot, and new terrain types such as Desert, Lookout, and Observatory.

items.name: v4.2.5 (dev)
items.body: Added a settings page, a new map, modifiers, zlyBot compatibility updates, and migrated the project to CMake.
items.summary: Added a settings page, a new map, modifiers, zlyBot compatibility updates, and migrated the project to CMake.

items.name: v4.2.4 (dev)
items.body: Added generals.io-style block numbering, local-game map zooming, the new zlyBot, labyrinth improvements, and a faster analysis graph presentation.
items.summary: Added generals.io-style block numbering, local-game map zooming, the new zlyBot, labyrinth improvements, and a faster analysis graph presentation.

items.name: v4.2.3 (dev)
items.body: Fixed map-selection errors, added in-game analysis graphs, and documented temporary web instability caused by v4.2 move-storage changes.
items.summary: Fixed map-selection errors, added in-game analysis graphs, and documented temporary web instability caused by v4.2 move-storage changes.

items.name: v4.2.2 (pre)
items.body: Added Labyrinth special maps with multiple styles and warned about temporary web-function bugs linked to the v4.2 move-storage changes.
items.summary: Added Labyrinth special maps with multiple styles and warned about temporary web-function bugs linked to the v4.2 move-storage changes.

items.name: v4.2.1 (pre)
items.body: Fixed local game speed problems, transparent ranklist titles, and removed import-map support from local games while web features were being revised.
items.summary: Fixed local game speed problems, transparent ranklist titles, and removed import-map support from local games while web features were being revised.

items.name: v4.2.0 (pre)
items.body: Changed the overall move-storage and replay encoding system, with a note that older replays may break and that web/game-speed issues would be addressed later.
items.summary: Changed the overall move-storage and replay encoding system, with a note that older replays may break and that web/game-speed issues would be addressed later.

items.name: v4.1.0
items.body: Renamed Army In Hand to AIH and moved the project and map configuration files to UTF-8 encoding.
items.summary: Renamed Army In Hand to AIH and moved the project and map configuration files to UTF-8 encoding.

items.name: v4.0.1
items.body: Fixed issues #23, #27, and #28 and continued refining the new LocalGen branch.
items.summary: Fixed issues #23, #27, and #28 and continued refining the new LocalGen branch.

items.name: v4.0.0
items.body: Added brand-new web support, replay turn jumping, unlocked local flushing speed, and introduced a new UI layout.
items.summary: Added brand-new web support, replay turn jumping, unlocked local flushing speed, and introduced a new UI layout.

items.name: v3.1.0
items.body: Added replay and Create Map support, beta labels for unfinished features, and notes about manually creating ini files for custom maps.
items.summary: Added replay and Create Map support, beta labels for unfinished features, and notes about manually creating ini files for custom maps.

items.name: v3.0.2
items.body: Completed more of the new UI, added speed settings, fixed count limits, addressed issues #11 and #15, and added map dragging and resizing.
items.summary: Completed more of the new UI, added speed settings, fixed count limits, addressed issues #11 and #15, and added map dragging and resizing.

items.name: v3.0.1
items.body: Fixed a bug in speed settings for the pre-release UI branch.
items.summary: Fixed a bug in speed settings for the pre-release UI branch.

items.name: v3.0.0
items.body: Added a brand-new UI, a donate button, stable 300x speed control, bundled new default maps, and flagged some unfinished buttons for future releases.
items.summary: Added a brand-new UI, a donate button, stable 300x speed control, bundled new default maps, and flagged some unfinished buttons for future releases.

items.name: v2.1.0
items.body: Fixed edge-selection bugs, removed dll dependence for maps, introduced a dedicated maps directory, and refined centered numbers and FPS precision.
items.summary: Fixed edge-selection bugs, removed dll dependence for maps, introduced a dedicated maps directory, and refined centered numbers and FPS precision.

items.name: v2.0.2
items.body: Added icon and version information to the window-size page, widened map-selection blocks, and fixed duplicate color naming.
items.summary: Added icon and version information to the window-size page, widened map-selection blocks, and fixed duplicate color naming.

items.name: v2.0.1
items.body: Added bot labels in the ranklist and improved SmartRandomBot.
items.summary: Added bot labels in the ranklist and improved SmartRandomBot.

items.name: v2.0.0
items.body: Introduced the first GUI version of the new LocalGen, with window-size selection and click-to-select gameplay controls.
items.summary: Introduced the first GUI version of the new LocalGen, with window-size selection and click-to-select gameplay controls.

items.name: v1.0.2
items.body: Extended cheatCode watching, rewrote game messages, added turn numbers, and introduced more in-game tips.
items.summary: Extended cheatCode watching, rewrote game messages, added turn numbers, and introduced more in-game tips.

items.name: v1.0.1
items.body: Fixed issue #9, repaired Import Map handling, rewrote map printing, and patched missing bottom-line separators.
items.summary: Fixed issue #9, repaired Import Map handling, rewrote map printing, and patched missing bottom-line separators.

items.name: v1.0.0
items.body: The first release of the new LocalGen delivered self-written code, a new UI, higher refresh rate, better robots, unlimited game speed, and a simplified MapCreator workflow.
items.summary: The first release of the new LocalGen delivered self-written code, a new UI, higher refresh rate, better robots, unlimited game speed, and a simplified MapCreator workflow.
